import React from "react"; import { CalendarDays, Bell, Clock, CheckCircle, Sun, Plus } from "lucide-react"; import "./Calendar.css"; const events=[ { date:"18 Jun", task:"ЁЯМ▒ Rice Plantation", time:"06:00 AM" }, { date:"20 Jun", task:"ЁЯТз Irrigation", time:"07:00 AM" }, { date:"22 Jun", task:"ЁЯзк Fertilizer Application", time:"08:00 AM" }, { date:"25 Jun", task:"ЁЯЪЬ Crop Inspection", time:"09:00 AM" }, { date:"28 Jun", task:"ЁЯМ╛ Harvest Preparation", time:"05:00 PM" }, { date:"30 Jun", task:"ЁЯМжя╕П Weather Check", time:"06:30 PM" } ]; export default function Calendar(){ return(
